federation.membershipTodo: OSS-integration SDK (not an app). An n8n community node (programmatic INodeType) that reads/writes a Solid pod over LDP from inside n8n automation workflows: Resource Read/Create/Update/Delete + Container List (ldp:contains parsed via @jeswr/fetch-rdf + @solid/object ContainerDataset). A SolidApi credential carries the pod base URL + an OIDC/bearer access token; full DPoP-bound Solid-OIDC is a documented follow-up seam. Writes are confined to the configured pod base (scope guard); http(s) only; the token is never logged. No federation membership of its own — it is workflow-automation glue reaching every n8n user.
